LSE-HS9-L4-13001400-HSALG1-CMF-LAT-01 • HS Algebra I • Creating Equations and Inequalities in One and Two Variables

The Mission File

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to figure out?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about what the girl is trying to figure out, explain the reasoning that makes that the right question, and state the conclusion about what she will tell her abuela.
